title: cajanus heynei
intro: Cajanus heynei, also known as Indian cluster bean or varige, is a plant species within the legume family, Fabaceae, native to the Indian subcontinent and Southeast Asia. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which help in treating various health issues such as fever, diarrhea, and skin conditions. The plant is known for its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function. The herbal preparations of Cajanus heynei include its leaves, which are used in various forms, including infusions, decoctions, and powders, to treat various health conditions.
